race.comment: CHATTERLEY (10) was scratched from Warwick Farm midweek to be kept for this first-up assignment. Talented filly whose career highlight was a two-length third in the Group 3 Reginald Allen at Randwick last prep. Two trials have been quiet leading into this - betting crucial but on face value she looks the one. TUPAKARA (12) started at $1.40 but gave away too much start and finished second when resuming over 1200m at Scone a fortnight ago. Placed behind Apocalyptic in two legs of the Princess Series in the Spring. Running out of friends but she is good enough to sweep these aside. CELLPHONE (1) is a Trapeze Artist gelding on debut for Waller. Two good trials in March look to have him ready for this assignment. Debutant JUMP AROUND (2) could sneak into the placings and add juice.
